assertions.assertion: Mentions ISamlSigninStateStore for distributed sign-in state persistence
assertions.rationale: ISamlSigninStateStore is Duende-specific and not in general knowledge.

assertions.assertion: Mentions ISamlLogoutSessionStore for distributed SLO session tracking
Recommends persistent storage (EF Core, Redis) instead of in-memory for multi-node
assertions.rationale: Without knowing the specific stores, a general LLM cannot make specific recommendations.

assertions.assertion: Notes that without distributed stores, SSO/SLO state is lost across nodes
assertions.rationale: A general LLM would not know the specific state management requirements of Duende SAML.
